ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversation the tweet belongs to */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the tweet was created */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the tweet was posted */,
  "timezone" INTEGER /* Timezone offset of the user's location */,
  "place" TEXT /* Location where the tweet was posted */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags used in the tweet */,
  "cashtags" TEXT /* Cashtags used in the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the tweet */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the tweet has received */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been quoted */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet */,
  "is_conspiracy" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the tweet is related to a conspiracy theory */,
  "parent_tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent tweet if this is a reply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_parent_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user is verified */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_active" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  "is_conspiracy_focused" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user frequently posts about conspiracy theories */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_name" TEXT /* Name of the hashtag */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the hashtag has been used */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the hashtag was first used */,
  "last_used" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last time the hashtag was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "url_link" TEXT /* Link to the URL */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the URL is mentioned in */,
  "click_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the URL has been clicked */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urls_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagements" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the engagement is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who engaged with the tweet */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (like, reply, retweet) */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the engagement was created */,
  "is_conspiracy" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the engagement is related to a conspiracy theory */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagements_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the reply is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who replied */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Text content of the reply */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the reply was created */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the reply has been quoted */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the reply */,
  "is_conspiracy" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the reply is related to a conspiracy theory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being retweeted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who retweeted */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the retweet was created */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the retweet has been quoted */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the retweet */,
  "is_conspiracy" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the retweet is related to a conspiracy theory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the mention is in */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who mentioned */,
  "mentioned_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being mentioned */,
  "is_conspiracy" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the mention is related to a conspiracy theory */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the mention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_mentioned_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("mentioned_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media item */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the media is associated with */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (image, video) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the media was created */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the media has been viewed */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the media has received */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the media */,
  "is_conspiracy" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the media is related to a conspiracy theory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_media_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)
